recommendations.title: The Pyramid
recommendations.overview: An archaeological team attempt to unlock the secrets of a lost pyramid only to find themselves hunted by an insidious creature.

recommendations.title: 6 Souls
recommendations.overview: A female forensic psychiatrist discovers that all of one of her patient's multiple personalities are murder victims. She will have to find out what's happening before her time is finished.

recommendations.title: Clinical
recommendations.overview: A psychiatrist tries to put her life back together after a violent attack by seeking to repair the life of a new patient, but he has his own terrifying history.

recommendations.title: Novocaine
recommendations.overview: A dentist finds himself a murder suspect after a sexy patient seduces him into prescribing her drugs.

recommendations.title: Fragile
recommendations.overview: Haunted by memories of a patient's death, a nurse  takes a job at an antiquated hospital for children. Soon she learns that the kids fear a ghost that prowls the floors and will not allow anyone to leave. Amy tries to protect them and convince the ot

recommendations.title: The Blue Elephant
recommendations.overview: After a five-year hiatus, psychiatrist Yehia returns to work at Abbasiya Hospital. He’s assigned to evaluate a patient who turns out to be his old friend. As events unfold, Yehia uncovers dark secrets that challenge his understanding of reality.

recommendations.title: Why Him?
recommendations.overview: A dad forms a bitter rivalry with his daughter's young rich boyfriend.

recommendations.title: K.O.
recommendations.overview: A CEO for a television channel finds his life torn apart after he wakes up from coma.

recommendations.title: The Favourite
recommendations.overview: England, early 18th century. The close relationship between Queen Anne and Sarah Churchill is threatened by the arrival of Sarah's cousin, Abigail Hill, resulting in a bitter rivalry between the two cousins to be the Queen's favourite.

recommendations.title: Hellbound: Hellraiser II
